title: Paper & Pen vs Zoho Books
metaTitle: Paper & Pen vs Zoho Books · Free Zoho Alternative · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Compare Paper & Pen and Zoho Books on price, free plan, Arabic RTL, multi-currency and GCC VAT. See why Paper & Pen is a free, Arabic-first Zoho alternative.
keywords: paper and pen vs zoho books, zoho books alternative, free zoho alternative, zoho books pricing, arabic accounting software, zoho vs free invoicing
heroTitle: Paper & Pen vs Zoho Books
heroSubtitle: Zoho Books is a mature, capable accounting suite. Paper & Pen is a free, Arabic-first ERP that bills in any currency and takes local payments. Here is an honest, side-by-side look.
heroBullets: Native OMR, AED, SAR plus any currency

features.title: Free where it counts
features.desc: Invoicing and sales are free forever, with no per-month floor before you can send a single invoice.

features.title: Arabic-first, five languages
features.desc: Full right-to-left interface and documents in Arabic, plus English, Hindi, Bengali and Urdu.

features.title: Local payment links
features.desc: Paymob and regional gateways are built in, so GCC customers can pay by card without a workaround.

sections.title: Where Zoho Books is strong
sections.body: Zoho Books is a well-established product with deep accounting features, a large app ecosystem and integrations across the wider Zoho suite. If you already live inside Zoho CRM, Projects and Mail, it slots in neatly. It is a serious tool and we will not pretend otherwise.
items: Tight fit if you already use Zoho One

sections.title: Free tier, Arabic and local fit
sections.body: Paper & Pen starts genuinely free for unlimited invoicing, runs a true Arabic right-to-left interface (not just translated labels), and bills natively in OMR, AED and SAR with correct decimals. Local card payments through Paymob and GCC 5% VAT are ready out of the box, and onboarding takes minutes rather than a setup project.
items: Free forever core, paid modules only when you grow
Genuine Arabic RTL, end to end
Native Gulf currencies and 5% VAT preset

faqs.q: Is Paper & Pen a good Zoho Books alternative?
faqs.a: Yes, especially if you want a free invoicing core, a true Arabic interface and native Gulf currencies. Zoho Books is excellent, but it has no free-forever core and its Arabic support is partial.
Sales and invoicing are free forever with no limit on invoices or customers. You only pay if you add optional modules such as Inventory, HR or Accounting.

faqs.q: Does Paper & Pen handle multi-currency like Zoho?
faqs.a: Yes. You can invoice in OMR, AED, SAR, USD, EUR and more, with correct decimals and per-document currency.

faqs.q: Can I take card payments like I can with Zoho?
faqs.a: Yes. Paymob and regional gateways are built in, so customers in the GCC and beyond can pay by card from the invoice link.
Yes. Paper & Pen runs a full right-to-left Arabic interface and Arabic documents, not only translated field names.

ctaSub: Create a free workspace and send your first invoice in minutes. No card, Arabic-ready, free forever.
